textByHash.12961e0beea32addd2aa9461180219f666c340c3: I should think so. Anyway did you need anything?
textByHash.3005a7e5c797d1510ce6a0ba470caf69d9f2c194: And you're a long way off the best, believe me.
textByHash.6977eb05f2678cd55be4c4b63f02c177697866b6: Hey! I've been mining all day thank you very much! I'm allowed a break ain't I?
textByHash.6f466a44804d03119e800a0f087cc7194c645fdc: Rocks? They're not rocks, they're minerals!
textByHash.7c892c2755722153fb771fc5f028c9ea0ef83237: We've found it's quite good for ranging ammunition, something you adventuring lot might like.
textByHash.8909d84e0ed1d1e500087e4aa363fe0550d704f8: All this mining is tiring work.
textByHash.8c5086c2517ee132529d0f81999043b3b11b4221: We use it a lot for Construction back in Keldagrim as well.
textByHash.9103eb44e816bfeeaec72241b9029b3d5bd3fc82: Because I said so that's why! Even the best human builders wouldn't know how to build with this stuff.
textByHash.eb9e8e2bc0cf4d99e791bf6529bd07dd04a6b727: Amethyst! We use it a lot back in Keldagrim but this is the only place we've managed to find it.
textByHash.f4aa722d05ca716f04a01d91f195817b178fd7dd: Well be on your way then. I've got mining to do!
